# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that creates releases and publishes packages. On version tags, build the application, create a GitHub release, and publish to npm/PyPI. Make the release process fully automated so developers can just push tags to trigger releases.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release

on:
  push:
    tags:
      - 'v*'

jobs:
  build-and-publish:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Node.js
      if: github.repository == 'your-repo/nodejs-package'
      uses: actions/setup-node@v2
      with:
        node-version: '14'

    - name: Install dependencies and build application
      run: |
        npm install
        npm run build

    - name: Publish to npm
      if: github.repository == 'your-repo/nodejs-package'
      env:
        NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
      run: npm publish --access public

    - name: Set up Python
      if: github.repository == 'your-repo/python-package'
      uses: actions/setup-python@v2
      with:
        python-version: '3.8'

    - name: Install dependencies and build application
      if: github.repository == 'your-repo/python-package'
      run: |
        pip install --upgrade setuptools wheel twine
        python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel

    - name: Publish to PyPI
      if: github.repository == 'your-repo/python-package'
      env:
        TWINE_USERNAME: ${{ secrets.PYPI_USERNAME }}
        TWINE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.PYPI_PASSWORD }}
      run: twine upload dist/*

    - name: Create GitHub Release
      uses: actions/create-release@v1
      with:
        tag_name: ${{ github.ref }}
        release_name: 'Release ${{ github.ref }}'
        body: |
          Changes in this release:
          - Description of changes.
        draft: false
        prerelease: false
